_meta.explanation: The store plan HAS the DISCOUNT_COUPONS, DISCOUNTS and ADVANCED_DISCOUNTS_FEATURE features enabled (see 00-store-profile.json), so coupons/promotions MAY exist. However, the connected Ecwid MCP server exposes NO tool to list discount coupons or promotions (the /discount_coupons REST endpoint is not wrapped). They could not be read via the available read-only tools. Listing coupons was therefore SKIPPED (no capable read tool), not skipped for safety.
_meta.catalogSaleSignal: Separately, NO product in 02-products-raw.json has a compareToPrice set (0/45). So there are no product-level 'sale' price annotations in the catalog right now, regardless of any cart-level coupons.

recommendation: If coupon/promotion data is needed for the frontend, pull it from Ecwid admin (Marketing > Discount coupons) or add a read-only wrapper for GET /api/v3/26630034/discount_coupons to the MCP server.
